title: Become an ESC Club Ambassador

content:
Edmonton Squash Club Ambassador Program

  • Have a passion for squash?
  • Want to share that passion?
  • Want to grow the squash community?

The ESC would like to develop a roster of members both male and female and at various levels of play, who are willing to volunteer a small amount of time in order to make new and prospective members feel welcome.  We are looking for established members to play a game or just have an informal hit with a new or prospective member and to share information about the club from a member’s perspective.  It is anticipated that this would take approximately an hour and would typically be a one-time event.  The purpose of this initiative is to establish ESC as a friendly community of squash players rather than simply a commercial sports club.  New members would still receive an introductory lesson from one of our pros.

 

If you have some flexibility in your schedule and enjoy meeting new people give some thought to becoming an ESC Club Ambassador.  Please indicate your interest by completing the attached form and e-mailing it to Anne.  She will act as the primary contact and endeavour to find a compatible match.
